name: Core Channels
description: Bundled web, Electron, Telegram, and Google Chat channel adapters.

capabilities.title: Web Channel
capabilities.description: Server-Sent Events channel used by the browser web application.

capabilities.title: Electron Channel
capabilities.description: Server-Sent Events channel used by the Electron desktop shell.

capabilities.title: Telegram Channel
capabilities.description: Telegram Bot API channel for linked Telegram conversations.

capabilities.title: Google Chat Channel
capabilities.description: Google Chat channel for linked Google Workspace conversations.
